dimensions.name: Instructional Leadership
dimensions.question: Does the leader ensure that all classes within their scope meet or exceed the FLS Vision of Excellence and lead to increased academic achievement?

dimensions.name: Cultural Leadership and Builder
dimensions.question: Does the leader build a motivational school culture that holds high behavioral and academic expectations for all by bringing together the students, staff and families in alignment with the school mission, vision and commitments?

dimensions.name: Personal Leadership and Builder
dimensions.question: Does the leader inspire and motivate all staff, students and parents to consistently model the key mindsets and Commitments that are the core of the Firstline way?

dimensions.name: Talent Management
dimensions.question: Does the leader ensure they plan for, cultivate, hire, develop and manage team members who value both results and relationships in a manner that includes the maintenance of a high performing team?

dimensions.name: Strategic and Operations Leadership
dimensions.question: Does the leader ensure that resources (structures, time, money, partnerships) within their scope are allocated effectively to support student learning and staff development?
